race.comment: SHINTONO (9) won on debut at Donald then took a quantum leap and did a great job to finish second in the Listed Bill Carter over 1350m at Doomben last start. That form is clearly the measuring stick in this field. Should enjoy the longer trip and she looks the goods. MOMOKA (12) worked home in good style to collect her maiden win over 1400m at the Sunshine Coast Poly last time out. Needs to go up a level or two today but getting out to the mile should help. GLENORCHY (6) settled midfield and couldn't improve on debut over 1200m at Randwick recently. Looked as though a longer journey would suit so he can improve. MYSTICAL (8) made steady inroads without threatening over 1300m at Illawarra Grange last weekend. Should appreciate a step up in distance. SAXON SPIRIT (11) has been finding the line well so a step up to 1600m is the right call.
